Fix boat thumbnails by using :global() for dynamically generated rows

commit.message:
Replace API polling with WebSocket real-time sync

- Backend: ws server (JWT auth, userId+householdId rooms, heartbeat, broadcast/broadcastToUser)
- Backend routes: broadcast after every mutation (lists, loyaltyCards, giftCards, expenses, household, invitations, notifications)
- notificationService: broadcastToUser on every notification creation for real-time bell badge
- Web: wsClient singleton (exponential backoff reconnect, on() subscribe API)
- Web App.tsx: WsManager connects/disconnects on auth change
- Web pages: replaced setInterval polling with wsClient.on() in ListsPage, ListDetailPage, TodoDetailPage, LoyaltyCardsPage, GiftCardsPage, ExpensesPage
- Web NotificationsBell: subscribes to notifications:changed for real-time unread badge
- Mobile: wsClient (identical pattern, EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL)
- Mobile _layout.tsx: connect/disconnect on accessToken change
- Mobile tabs: replaced setInterval polling in gift-cards, loyalty-cards, expenses
- Tests: 436 passing (18 unit + 14 integration tests added for WS server and broadcast)

commit.message:
fix: pt_users 조회 .single() → .maybeSingle()로 406 에러 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fixes/community edit wizard (#28)

* fix(community-edit): add dev bypass for email verification

When COMMUNITY_EDIT_DEV_BYPASS_VERIFICATION=true (already set in
.env.development), the start endpoint skips sending the verification
email, immediately marks the submission as verified, sets the session
cookie, and returns devBypassed flag so the frontend redirects straight
to the profile editor. This avoids the 500 error from Mailgun not
being configured locally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(community-edit): resolve context names for unpopulated relationships

When Payload's depth:1 doesn't populate polymorphic context
relationships (leaving context.value as a number instead of an object),
engagement names displayed as "#134" instead of the actual program/event
name. Now falls back to batch-fetching event/program names explicitly
when depth population fails, and uses the engagement's own contextKind
and contextDate fields instead of extracting them from the related doc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(community-edit): include cohorts in engagement context name resolution

Cohort engagements were showing as "#134" because the context name
resolution only handled events and programs, completely ignoring
cohorts. Added cohort support to both the populated and unpopulated
code paths, and updated the frontend type to include 'cohort' as a
valid contextKind.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(community-edit): add error handling to impacts page bootstrap

The impacts page bootstrap had no try-catch around getPersonData() and
getStagedSummary() calls. If either threw, setIsLoadingSession(false)
never ran and the page hung on "Loading session..." indefinitely.
Now gracefully handles errors: falls back to showing the page without
staged data if getStagedSummary() fails, or shows an error message if
getPersonData() also fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* create migrations

* fix(community-review): move review pages to own route group for Tailwind CSS

The review pages were under the (payload) route group which only loads
Payload's CSS, not Tailwind. Moved to a new (admin-custom) route group
with its own Tailwind-enabled layout. Also added a submissions list page
at /admin/community-review showing all submissions with pending reviews
prioritized at the top.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: validate VM agent identity in task runner health checks (#237)

The task runner's health check could be satisfied by the API Worker's
own /health endpoint (which also returns 200) due to Cloudflare
same-zone subrequest routing. This caused the system to advance past
the agent readiness gate and fail with a 404 on workspace creation.

Fix: parse the health response body and verify it contains a nodeId
matching the expected node. The VM agent includes nodeId in its health
response; the API Worker does not. Also add health pre-checks for
node reuse paths (warm, preferred, existing) to catch unhealthy agents
before attempting workspace creation.

commit.message:
cryocare: support single-bin _EVN_Vol.mrc naming convention

AreTomo3 single --at-bin runs produce ts-xxx_EVN_Vol.mrc / _ODD_Vol.mrc
(EVN before Vol), but the existing glob expected ts-xxx{suffix}_EVN.mrc.

_find_evn_odd_pairs now tries _EVN_Vol.mrc first when vol_suffix is ''
or '_Vol', falling back to the multi-bin _b4_EVN.mrc pattern.  This
means vol_suffix='' (default) auto-detects both naming conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add risk-free asset & tangency portfolio to efficient frontier tab

Adds a checkbox to enable a risk-free asset with configurable rate,
computes the tangency (max Sharpe ratio) portfolio analytically with
a sweep fallback for singular covariance, and displays the Capital
Allocation Line and tangency point on the chart. Includes educational
section with Sharpe ratio, tangency weight formula, CAL equation, and
two-fund separation theorem.

commit.message:
refactor: 重构得分融合为直接加权，调整困惑度权重至60%

权重方案（有全部三维度时）：
- 分类器：20%
- 困惑度：60%
- 突发性：20%

降级方案：
- 仅分类器+困惑度：25% + 75%
- 仅分类器+突发性：70% + 30%
- 仅分类器：100%

commit.message:
Fix Jerusalem shelter proxy blocked by Akamai WAF

The Jerusalem GIS server (gisviewer.jerusalem.muni.il) uses Akamai WAF
which blocks datacenter IPs including Vercel's, causing 403 errors.

Serve pre-fetched Jerusalem shelter data (153 locations) via a static
API endpoint instead of proxying to the blocked GIS server. Also improve
the generic proxy with better browser headers and POST support.

Fix double basePath on images, logo, and pagefind

file paths. Files in public/study-guide/ were served at

public/study-guide/ to public/ and remove /study-guide/ prefix from all
image src attributes. Also fix pagefind output path.

commit.message:
Always print errors in human-readable format to stderr

printError() now always outputs human-readable text to stderr regardless
of --json mode. JSON on stdout for success responses is unaffected.
This keeps stderr useful for humans debugging failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate crypto operations to Web Crypto API (#2411)

* Replace node:crypto with Web Crypto API for ESM/browser compatibility

Rewrites packages/utils/src/crypto.ts to use the Web Crypto API
(globalThis.crypto.subtle) instead of node:crypto. This makes the
crypto utilities work in both server and browser environments.

All three exported functions (hashToken, encrypt, decrypt) are now
async since crypto.subtle methods return Promises. All callers have
been updated accordingly—Effect.gen contexts use Effect.promise(),
and async test helpers use await.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018Xf8qEro4Jjoek6zUnpDTt

* Use Effect.tryPromise for crypto operations and convert helpers to Effects

- Replace Effect.promise with Effect.tryPromise for hashToken calls in
  auth middleware and generate-api-key use-case since crypto operations
  can theoretically fail
- Convert toDomainApiKey and toInsertRow from async functions returning
  Promises to functions returning Effect.Effect with typed RepositoryError,
  enabling direct yield* composition in Effect.gen contexts
- Use Effect.all instead of Effect.promise(Promise.all(...)) for
  mapping collections through Effects

https://claude.ai/code/session_018Xf8qEro4Jjoek6zUnpDTt

* Apply linter formatting to generate-api-key import

https://claude.ai/code/session_018Xf8qEro4Jjoek6zUnpDTt

* Convert crypto functions to return Effects with typed CryptoError

All crypto functions (hashToken, encrypt, decrypt) now return
Effect.Effect<T, CryptoError> instead of Promise<T>. This enables
proper Effect composition throughout the codebase:

- Domain/platform packages compose crypto Effects directly via yield*
- Repository adapters map CryptoError → RepositoryError at boundaries
  using Effect.mapError
- App-level code (auth middleware) lets CryptoError propagate through
  the Effect error channel where orDie handles it
- Test files use Effect.runPromise at the boundary

Adds effect as a dependency of @repo/utils and exports CryptoError
as a tagged error type for typed error handling.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018Xf8qEro4Jjoek6zUnpDTt

* Add Web Standards First guidance to AGENTS.md

Documents the preference for Web Standard APIs over Node.js-specific
modules in shared packages to maximise compatibility with browser,
edge, and alternative server runtimes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018Xf8qEro4Jjoek6zUnpDTt

---------

commit.message:
Add hydraulic pressure calculation feature (Phases 3-5) and staging setup guide

This commit implements the complete hydraulic pressure loss calculation system:

Phase 3: Connection Properties & Automatic Calculation
- Extended connection data model with rohrlänge_m, rohrdimension, faktor, druckverlust_m
- Updated ConnectionModal with automatic pressure loss calculation using active formula
- Added real-time calculation via useEffect hook
- Display calculated pressure loss with color-coded status (green/orange/gray)
- Pass formulaskatalog through ConfiguratorEditor and ConfiguratorWrapper

Phase 4: Path-Based Pressure Loss Calculation
- New pathCalculator.js utility with BFS graph traversal algorithms
- findPumps() - identifies modules with enabled pumps
- findPathsFromPump() - BFS to find all reachable endpoints from pump
- calculatePathLoss() - sums losses along path and multiplies by 2 for brine circuit
- calculatePumpUtilization() - calculates pump usage percentage with status
- New PumpAnalysis component with comprehensive UI:
  * Summary statistics (total pumps, overloaded, underutilized)
  * Warning cards for issues (overload, near capacity, missing data)
  * Detailed pump cards showing all paths from each pump
  * Per-path utilization bars with color coding
  * Expandable details showing individual connection losses
- Added "Pumpenanalyse" tab in ConfiguratorApp
- Unit tests for path calculator (pathCalculator.test.js)

Phase 5: Pump Definitions & Display
- Extended InputOutputEditor with pump configuration UI:
  * Checkbox to enable/disable pump on hydraulic outputs
  * Förderhöhe input field (lift capacity in meters)
  * Only shown for outputs with hydraulic connection type
- Updated ModuleNode with pump badge (💧 PUMPE) for visual indication
- Enhanced ListView with pump information:
  * Header badge showing pump presence
  * Pump count in subtitle
  * Highlighted pump outputs in green with capacity display
- Extended data model in types.js:
  * Added pump object to outputs (enabled, förderhoehe_m)

Additional:
- Added formula catalog backend endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE /api/catalogs/formulas)
- New Formulas.jsx component for formula management with live testing
- Created formulaEvaluator.js utility with secure evaluation (Function constructor, not eval)
- Comprehensive unit tests for formula evaluator (30+ test cases)
- Added STAGING_SETUP_BRIEFING.md with complete staging system setup documentation

Technical improvements:
- BFS algorithm for cycle-safe graph traversal
- Brine circuit multiplier (×2) for supply + return paths
- Junction node support in path finding
- Pump utilization status indicators (OK, Warning, Overload, Underutilized)
- Real-time calculation with error handling

fix: 新用户部署问题全面修复

## 修复内容

### 1. UserMappingService 死锁问题 (严重)
- AddMapping/RemoveMapping/SetTelegramUsername 持有锁时调用 scheduleSave
- 修改为先释放锁再调用 scheduleSave

### 2. install.sh 初始化文件格式不匹配
- feedbacks.json → feedback.json (文件名修正)
- review_requests.json: {"requests":{}} → {} (格式修正)
- search_history.json: {"histories":{}} → {} (格式修正)
- media_notifications.json: {"notifications":{}} → {"settings":{}} (键名修正)

## 影响
- 新用户部署时服务可以正常启动和绑定账号
- 已部署用户需要重新构建镜像
